ayahs.translation: In the name of Allāh,[2] the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.[3]
[All] praise is [due] to Allāh, Lord[4] of the worlds -
The Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,
Sovereign of the Day of Recompense.[5]
It is You we worship and You we ask for help.
Guide us to the straight path -

ayahs.arabic: صِرَٰطَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ ٱلْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Sirata allatheena anAAamta AAalayhim ghayri almaghdoobi AAalayhim wala addalleen
ayahs.translation: The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor, not of those who have earned [Your] anger or of those who are astray.
